headline: Clear calendar and no inbound messages — use today to drive deep progress on the two open Evals UX tickets before month-end.

quick_wins.task: Triage AE-1079: outline the 'no ground truth' design doc for generated evaluations
quick_wins.why: It's in To Do with Normal priority — spending 20 min sketching the doc structure and key questions will unblock moving it to In Progress

quick_wins.task: Fix Salesforce and Snowflake credentials so dashboards are available tomorrow
quick_wins.why: Both integrations are broken (auth errors); you're flying blind on escalations and adoption metrics

must_make_progress.task: Advance AE-744: Justification + Actual vs Expected UX for all Evaluators
must_make_progress.why: Major priority, In Progress — this is your highest-value Evals deliverable and aligns with the 26.4+ key deliverables around evals in the OKR page

must_make_progress.task: Draft the 'no ground truth' design doc for AE-1079
must_make_progress.why: Generated evaluations without ground truth is a key gap; getting a first draft out today sets up review cycles this week

must_communicate_with.about: Sync on AE-744 UX direction for low-code vs coded evaluator justification display — confirm alignment before you go deeper
Salesforce and Snowflake credential failures — request credential reset or token refresh

must_report_status.topic: Evals UX progress (AE-744, AE-1079) for upcoming bi-weekly TR
must_report_status.note: Next Big Rock TR will expect status on evals; prepare a concise update paragraph now while context is fresh

agents_in_production.vs_goal: Snowflake auth broken — fix credentials to restore dashboard

flags: Salesforce integration is down (INVALID_LOGIN) — no visibility into customer escalations. Resolve urgently.
Snowflake metrics connection is down (empty password) — adoption and funnel dashboards are dark.
Both Jira tickets have no due dates set — consider adding target dates to signal urgency to stakeholders.
Month-end today: good checkpoint to document April progress on Evals workstream for OKR tracking.

outcomes.business_impact: No escalations or customer blockers visible today (though Salesforce is down); primary impact opportunity is advancing the Evals UX that directly supports the 26.4 Agents key deliverables.
outcomes.product_adoption: Evals adoption metrics unavailable due to Snowflake outage; restoring dashboards and progressing AE-744 (evaluator justification UX) are the two levers to move adoption forward today.

slack_summary: Clear calendar and empty inbox — today is a maker day. Top priorities: (1) push AE-744 Evals UX forward (Major, In Progress) and (2) draft the no-ground-truth design doc for AE-1079. Also flag: both Salesforce and Snowflake creds are broken, so escalation and metric dashboards are dark — get IT to fix today. Zero meetings.
